arts.ttl: Middlesbrough loanee discusses potential transfer after summer move left him 'gutted'
arts.sum: Zach Hemming will be hoping to complete a permanent move to St Mirren this summer, but says he must ultimately respect whatever decision Middlesbrough make on his future. “It wasn’t even just for me [being gutted] but the family too, my missus would want to go to the games and my mum would go too,” he said.

arts.ttl: Jonny Howson's Boro future addressed as latest contract nears its end
arts.sum: Without confirming as such, Howson sounds ready to play on next season, and it means Boro will have a decision to make on whether to hand him another new deal, or allow him to move on and attempt to navigate the future without being so reliant on Howson. Covering as a centre-back during Boro’s defensive injury crisis, his calmness and composure has been a massive asset to Boro as they’ve won two and drawn one of his three starts.

arts.ttl: Venky's 'do not want to sell' Blackburn Rovers
arts.sum: Blackburn Rovers owners Venky's do not want to sell the club and have not received any concrete offers to take over, BBC Radio Lancashire is told.
